module.name: Products
module.description: Product catalogue items for quoting and supplier purchasing.

fields.label: Sales Price
fields.help_text: Default customer sell price copied onto quote lines. It can still be adjusted per quote line.

fields.label: Quote Cost Currency
fields.help_text: Currency for the default quote cost of sale. For the NLight catalogue this is EUR from the workbook cost-of-sale column.

fields.label: Quote Cost
fields.help_text: Default cost of sale used for quote margin calculations. For NLight this is the EUR cost copied to quote lines, not the direct supplier purchase cost.

fields.label: Quote Cost Mode
fields.help_text: Controls how quote costing should be handled: use catalogue cost, require manual cost per quote, or pass the cost through with no markup.

fields.label: Purchase Currency
fields.help_text: Currency used for purchasing from the actual supplier/factory. This feeds supplier and purchase order costing.

fields.label: Buy Price
fields.help_text: Direct supplier/factory purchase cost. For NLight this is EcoTech's USD supplier cost from the catalogue, separate from quote cost.

fields.label: Intercompany Cost Currency
fields.help_text: Currency for the internal transfer price between entities. For NLight this is the USD price charged from EcoTech to NLight BV.

fields.label: Intercompany Cost
fields.help_text: Internal transfer cost between entities. For NLight this is column N in the catalogue and is hidden from Sales users.

fields.label: Fulfilment Mode
fields.help_text: Use made to order for factory-supplied catalogue items, stocked for inventory items, and hybrid when both are possible.

fields.label: Lead Time (Weeks)
fields.help_text: Expected supplier/factory lead time copied onto quote and order lines for internal planning.

fields.label: Minimum Order Quantity
fields.help_text: Minimum quantity normally required by the supplier. Copied to quote and order lines for purchasing reference.

fields.label: Preferred Supplier
fields.help_text: Internal supplier/factory used for purchasing defaults. Hidden from Sales access profiles.

fields.label: Supplier / Factory Ref
fields.help_text: Supplier SKU or factory reference used by procurement. Hidden from Sales access profiles.

fields.label: Catalogue Source
fields.help_text: Reference to the source file or import that created the catalogue item.

fields.label: Catalogue Row Number
fields.help_text: Source row number from the supplier/customer catalogue import for audit and re-import checks.

fields.label: Manufacturer Model
fields.help_text: Original supplier/manufacturer model code. This can differ from the internal product code.

fields.label: Wattage
fields.help_text: Fixture wattage used for quoting, specifications, and customer-facing document detail.

fields.label: Spectrum
fields.help_text: Light spectrum or LED mix, copied onto quote/order line snapshots.

fields.label: Input Voltage
fields.help_text: Electrical input voltage specification copied onto quote/order line snapshots.

fields.label: PPE (umol/s/W)
fields.help_text: Photosynthetic photon efficacy. Stored as text because some catalogue rows include notes or combined values.

fields.label: PPF (umol/s)
fields.help_text: Photosynthetic photon flux output used in lighting specifications.

fields.label: Modules
fields.help_text: Fixture module count or catalogue module note. Kept as text because some accessory rows are not numeric.

fields.label: Supplier
fields.help_text: Actual supplier/factory for this source row. Sales profiles should not have access to this entity.

fields.label: Supplier SKU / Factory Ref
fields.help_text: Supplier's own product reference used on purchase orders.

fields.label: Purchase Description
fields.help_text: Description to use internally or on supplier purchase orders if it differs from the sales description.

fields.label: Purchase Currency
fields.help_text: Currency this supplier charges in for this item.

fields.label: Unit Cost
fields.help_text: Supplier purchase unit cost for this source row. Hidden from Sales.

fields.label: MOQ
fields.help_text: Minimum order quantity for this supplier source.

fields.label: Lead Time (Weeks)
fields.help_text: Expected lead time from this supplier source.

fields.label: Supplier Incoterm
fields.help_text: Default purchase/shipping term for this supplier source.

fields.label: Primary Supplier
fields.help_text: When active, this supplier row can sync defaults back onto the product.
